messages.content: You are investigating the gallery-reader project to understand its image loading pipeline.

In the gallery-reader project, trace how gallery images flow from the server to the browser. Find all fetch() calls related to image loading, sprite generation, and blob URL management. I want to understand the full pipeline from request to display.
